name: pollinations
title: Pollinations AI
description: Generate images, text, and audio using Pollinations.AI - the world's most accessible open GenAI platform. Includes separate commands for text, image, and audio generation.
author: knoopx

commands.name: generate-text
commands.title: Generate Text
commands.subtitle: Generate text with AI
commands.description: Generate text responses using AI models

commands.name: generate-image
commands.title: Generate Image
commands.subtitle: Generate images with AI
commands.description: Generate images from text prompts using AI models

commands.name: generate-audio
commands.title: Generate Audio
commands.subtitle: Generate audio with AI
commands.description: Convert text to speech using AI voices

preferences.name: apiToken
preferences.title: API Token
preferences.description: Optional bearer token for higher rate limits and premium features (get from auth.pollinations.ai)
